questions.text: The common difference of an AP is denoted by:
questions.explanation: In an Arithmetic Progression (AP), 'd' denotes the common difference between consecutive terms.

questions.text: The sum of first n terms of GP is a(r^n - 1)/(r-1) for r ≠ 1.
questions.explanation: Sum of n terms of GP: Sn = a(r^n - 1)/(r-1) for r ≠ 1, where a is first term, r is common ratio.

questions.text: The arithmetic mean of a and b is ________.
questions.explanation: Arithmetic Mean (AM) of two numbers a and b is (a+b)/2
